phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wine tasting area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la zona de cata de vinos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh es-TAH la SOH-nah deh KAH-tah deh VEE-nohs?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, a la izquierda del mostrador.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah DEHL moh-strah-DOHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, to the left of the counter.

responses.english: At the back, to the left of the counter.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah DEHL moh-strah-DOHR
responses.french: Al fondo, a la izquierda del mostrador.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which wines are from Binissalem DO
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué vinos son de la DO Binissalem?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, keh VEE-nos son deh la DOH Bee-nee-SA-lem?

likely_response.local: Están en la estantería central, etiqueta roja.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHSTÁN EHN LAH eh-stahn-teh-RÍ-ah thehnt-RAHL eh-tee-k-EH-tah ROH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: They are on the central shelf, red label.

responses.english: They are on the central shelf, red label.
responses.phonetic: EHSTÁN EHN LAH eh-stahn-teh-RÍ-ah thehnt-RAHL eh-tee-k-EH-tah ROH-hah
responses.french: Están en la estantería central, etiqueta roja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wine region maps are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde hay mapas de la región vinícola?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh ah-ee MAH-pahs deh lah reh-hee-OHN vee-NEE-koh-lah?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador de información, entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: On the information desk, main entrance.

responses.english: On the information desk, main entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: En el mostrador de información, entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a wine recommendation to take home
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué vino me recomienda para llevar a casa?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, keh BEE-noh meh rreh-koh-MYEN-dah PAH-rah yeh-VAR ah KAH-sah?

likely_response.local: Le recomiendo este vino de la tierra, ideal para regalo.
likely_response.pronunciation: LEH reh-koh-mee-EHN-doh EH-steh BEE-noh DEH LAH tee-EHR-rah ee-deh-AHL PAH-rah reh-GAH-loh
likely_response.translation_en: I recommend this local wine, ideal for a gift.

responses.english: I recommend this local wine, ideal for a gift.
responses.phonetic: LEH reh-koh-mee-EHN-doh EH-steh BEE-noh DEH LAH tee-EHR-rah ee-deh-AHL PAH-rah reh-GAH-loh
responses.french: Le recomiendo este vino de la tierra, ideal para regalo.
